title: User tries to commit before all required slots are filled — bot refuses, lists missing
user_persona: Impatient buyer trying to skip slots

conversation.user: Create a PO for SUP-100. Just do it, figure out the rest.

bot_must: list the missing required slots: numbering_series, po_date, currency, buyer (if not auto-derivable), at least one line item with item_code/quantity/cost
explain the bot cannot fabricate these values

conversation.user: Fine. Today, USD, buyer BUY-1, numbering PO/STD/2026, item ITM-50 10 units at 30.

bot_must: ask one final confirmation before commit

evaluation_metrics.missing_slots_listed: bot lists each missing slot by name
evaluation_metrics.no_hallucinated_defaults: bot does not fill missing slots with plausible-looking values
